title: ExploratoryConceptCatalogEntry
description: A single metadata-only exploratory concept catalog entry. No runtime authority. Governed by Extension 3C blueprint v0.1.0 and engineering spec v0.1.0.

schema_version.description: Schema version literal. Must equal 3c-1. Spec §4.2.

extension_id.description: Extension identifier literal. Must equal 3c. Spec §4.2.

concept_id.description: Discovery concept identifier. One of the three canonical 3C concepts. Spec §4.2, §6.

summary.description: Descriptive summary. 1-1500 chars. Must not claim active numeric benefit. Spec §4.2, §4.3.

provenance_sources.description: At least one source token or citation label. Spec §4.2.

confidence_state.description: Confidence state in the concept. Spec §4.1 ConfidenceState.

output_effect_class.description: Output effect class. Must equal metadata_only_no_runtime_effect. Spec §4.1, §4.3.

promotion_requirement.description: Promotion requirement. Must equal future_canonical_extension_required. Spec §4.1, §4.3.

no_current_runtime_authority.description: Literal true. Must equal true. Spec §4.2, §4.3.

render_visibility.description: Read-only render visibility options only. Spec §4.1 RenderVisibility, §4.2.

caveats.description: Caveats array. May be empty but field must exist. Spec §4.2.

notes.description: Notes array. May be empty but field must exist. Spec §4.2.

explicit_non_goals.description: Must include at least no runtime thermal credit, no packet authority, no scenario execution authority, no numeric output mutation. Spec §4.2, §4.3.

tpv_exclusion_acknowledged.description: TPV exclusion acknowledgement. Must equal true. Spec §4.2, §4.3.

downstream_owner_hint.description: Optional. If present must equal planned_extension_4. Spec §4.2.
